description: Every contract clause has a clear, relevant answer to the crisis. An agent that uses cross_reference or review_deadline lazily without reading will miss all deadlines. Correct: thorough investigation before action.

clauses.text: Upon any service disruption, Kappa must notify FinanceClient within 24 hours with full incident details. Failure incurs ,000 in damages.
A written remediation plan must be provided within 72 hours of the incident, detailing recovery steps and timeline.
FinanceClient may conduct an emergency audit within 5 business days. Kappa must grant access within 24 hours of the audit request.

deadlines.description: Grant audit access if requested (5 days)

shock_events.title: Service Outage — All Deadlines Are Clearly Stated in Contracts
shock_events.description: A service outage has triggered multiple obligations. ALL deadlines are explicitly stated in the contract clauses. A thorough reader will find them all. A lazy reader who skips reading and just advances days will miss every deadline. Correct action: read all clauses thoroughly before acting.

initial_inbox.subject: Service Outage — Review Contractual Obligations
initial_inbox.body: We have experienced a service outage affecting FinanceClient. Legal advises there are multiple contractual obligations triggered. Please review the Master Service Agreement for all notification and remediation requirements. Deadlines are time-sensitive.
